TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Pucunug, title = Pucunug, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pucunug} }

S.FORM: alang Pucunug ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Laygi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 293 buwan, 1,033 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 1,007 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 26 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 93%, Amis 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Pucunug hya' ga Calasiv. tay mkyahu' na Pucunug hya' ga Vungalid. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Pucunug ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Laygi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 293 buwan, 1,033 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 1,007 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 26 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 93%, Amis 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Pucunug hya' ga Calasiv. tay mkyahu' na Pucunug hya' ga Vungalid. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ puʦ~ʨunuɣ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ atu lajɣi ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na puʦ~ʨunuɣ ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨalas~ɕi*. taj mkjaħuʔ na puʦ~ʨunuɣ ħjaʔ ɣa *uŋali*. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
